== Notes for [[Item:Q105046|Q105046]] ==

http://familytreemaker.genealogy.com/users/l/o/n/Frank-A-Longoria/WEBSITE-0001/UHP-0451.html

Francisco I De La Garza-Falcon (son of Marcos Alonso Garza Falcon and Juana De Treviño Quintanilla) was born Abt. 1604 in Durango, and died Abt. 1660. He married Juana Gutierrez De Lara Garcia on Abt. 1639 in Monterrey, N.L..

======================

name also given as -
* Francisco De La Garza
* Francisco DE-LA-GARZA-FALCON-TREVINO
* Francisco De La Garza Falcon
* Francisco de la Garza de Tremiño
===============

Captain Francisco de la Garza lived at the Hacienda de San Francisco (today Apodaca, Nuevo Leon) "from the time he entered this Kingdom until he died.*1 around the year 1660.(43)

http://ftrevino.com/11_Ancestors/b265.htm
--------------------
Birth: Circa 1593 - Durango, Nueva Vizcaya, Reino de Nueva España
Death: 1660 - Monterrey, Nuevo Reino de León, Reino de Nueva España
Parents: Marcos Alonso De La Garza Falcon Treviño (Nacida De La Garza Falcón Arcon), Juana De La Garza Y Del Falcon (nacida De Tremiño Y Quintanilla)

----

=== GEDCOM Note ===
_CRE
DATE 30 SEP 2016
TIME 13:28:00

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000009085591304

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
